programme.title: Love Sex Aur Dhoka
programme.desc: An Indian anthology film that tells three separate but interconnected stories revolving around the themes of love, sex, and betrayal. The film is shot in a found-footage style, utilizing surveillance cameras, mobile phones, and webcams to capture the stories of individuals from different backgrounds, whose lives are intertwined in unexpected ways. It explores the dark side of relationships and the impact of technology on modern romance.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four young loafers wish to simplify their life by wooing a loaded heiress. Unfortunately, there's only one rich girl in the neighbourhood. The boys scamper to woo her first, not knowing that their efforts would lead them right into a murder mystery.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of three men changes overnight when they lose all the money they invested in a scam. Now, they must find another way to repay the dreaded loan sharks or face their death.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
